---
title: "Fragmentomics - ER status prediction"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r load-data, include=FALSE}
source("R/load_and_process_data.R")
dir.create("results/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r colors-labels}
arm_colors           <- c("arm_A" = "#4E79A7", "arm_B" = "#F28E2B")
arm_labels           <- c("arm_A" = "Combination treatment arm", "arm_B" = "Monotherapy arm")
timepoint_colors     <- c("BL" = "#A6C8E0", "PD" = "#F28E2B")
timepoint_labels     <- c("BL" = "Baseline", "PD" = "Progression")
er_prediction_colors <- c("ER+" = "#E15759", "ER-" = "#4E79A7")
outlier_colors       <- c("L8788" = "#E15759", "L9747" = "#4E79A7")
outlier_patnr_colors <- c("541"   = "#E15759", "1040"  = "#4E79A7")
```

## ER status prediction

```{r paired-trajectories}
paired_plot_data <- griffin_data |>
    select(sampleName_shWGS, patnr, arm, timepoint, ER_probability, is_outlier) |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    filter(n() == 2) |>
    ungroup()

ggplot(paired_plot_data, aes(x = timepoint, y = ER_probability)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = patnr, color = arm), alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_point(aes(color = arm), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(
        data    = paired_plot_data |> filter(is_outlier),
        color   = "black", size = 4, shape = 1, stroke = 1.2
    ) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data      = paired_plot_data |> filter(is_outlier),
        aes(label = patnr),
        color = "black", size = 3, nudge_x = 0.2
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    scale_color_manual(values = arm_colors, labels = arm_labels, name = "Treatment arm") +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = timepoint_labels) +
    labs(
        title = "ER subtype probability: baseline to progression",
        x     = "Timepoint",
        y     = "P(ER+)"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_er_probability_trajectories.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r er-vs-tf}
pd_data  <- griffin_data |> filter(timepoint == "PD", !is.na(tumor_fraction))
cor_test <- cor.test(pd_data$tumor_fraction, pd_data$ER_probability, method = "spearman")

pd_data |>
    ggplot(aes(x = tumor_fraction, y = ER_probability)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = arm), size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "grey30", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(
        data    = pd_data |> filter(is_outlier),
        color   = "black", size = 4, shape = 1, stroke = 1.2
    ) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data      = pd_data |> filter(is_outlier),
        aes(label = patnr),
        color = "black", size = 3
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dotted", color = "red",    alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.10, linetype = "dotted", color = "orange", alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = arm_colors, labels = arm_labels, name = "Treatment arm") +
    labs(
        title    = "ER probability vs tumour fraction at progression",
        subtitle = sprintf("Spearman rho = %.2f, p < 0.001", cor_test$estimate),
        x        = "Tumour fraction (ichorCNA)",
        y        = "P(ER+)"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_er_probability_vs_tumour_fraction.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
```

## Nucleosome coverage profiles

```{r mean-coverage-profiles, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
coverage_annotated |>
    group_by(site_name_clean, position, ER_prediction_label) |>
    summarise(mean_coverage = mean(coverage, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
    ggplot(aes(x = position, y = mean_coverage, color = ER_prediction_label)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    facet_wrap(~site_name_clean, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = er_prediction_colors, name = "ER prediction") +
    labs(
        title = "Mean nucleosome coverage profiles by ER prediction",
        x     = "Position relative to site center (bp)",
        y     = "Normalized coverage"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_mean_coverage_profiles_by_er_prediction.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 12, height = 8)
```

```{r outlier-profiles, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
cohort_ribbon <- coverage_annotated |>
    group_by(site_name_clean, position) |>
    summarise(
        mean_cov = mean(coverage, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd_cov   = sd(coverage,   na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups  = "drop"
    )

outlier_profiles <- coverage_annotated |>
    filter(is_outlier) |>
    select(site_name_clean, position, coverage, sample, patnr) |>
    rename(mean_coverage = coverage)

overlay_data <- bind_rows(
    cohort_ribbon |> mutate(sample = "Cohort Mean", mean_coverage = mean_cov),
    outlier_profiles
)

site_labels <- c(
    "ER_neg_heme"     = "ER negative (Heme)",
    "ER_neg_specific" = "ER negative (Specific)",
    "ER_pos_heme"     = "ER positive (Heme)",
    "ER_pos_specific" = "ER positive (Specific)"
)

ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(
        data = cohort_ribbon,
        aes(x = position, ymin = mean_cov - sd_cov, ymax = mean_cov + sd_cov),
        fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_line(
        data = overlay_data |> filter(sample == "Cohort Mean"),
        aes(x = position, y = mean_coverage),
        color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_line(
        data = overlay_data |> filter(sample != "Cohort Mean"),
        aes(x = position, y = mean_coverage, color = patnr),
        linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~site_name_clean, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2,
               labeller = labeller(site_name_clean = site_labels)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = outlier_patnr_colors, name = "ER- predicted patient") +
    labs(
        title = "Coverage profiles of ER- predicted samples vs cohort mean",
        x     = "Position relative to site center (bp)",
        y     = "Normalized coverage"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_outlier_profiles.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 12, height = 8)
```

## Logistic regression model

```{r model-coefficients}
model_coefs |>
    filter(feature != "intercept") |>
    mutate(
        feature_short = gsub("_ER_(neg|pos)_(heme|specific)\\.5e-4_qval", "", feature) |>
            paste0("\n(", stringr::str_extract(feature, "ER_(neg|pos)_(heme|specific)"), ")"),
        direction = ifelse(
            coefficient > 0,
            "Positive (pushes toward ER+)",
            "Negative (pushes toward ER-)"
        )
    ) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(feature_short, coefficient), y = coefficient, fill = direction)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
            "Positive (pushes toward ER+)" = "#E15759",
            "Negative (pushes toward ER-)" = "#4E79A7"
        ),
        name = ""
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
    labs(
        title = "Logistic regression model coefficients",
        x     = "",
        y     = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_logistic_regression_coefficients.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 6)
```

```{r feature-contributions-setup}
feature_coefs <- model_coefs |> filter(feature != "intercept")
feature_names <- feature_coefs$feature
coef_vec      <- feature_coefs$coefficient
scaler_mean   <- feature_coefs$scaler_mean
scaler_scale  <- feature_coefs$scaler_scale
intercept     <- model_coefs |> filter(feature == "intercept") |> pull(coefficient)

raw_features    <- griffin_data |> select(sampleName_shWGS, all_of(feature_names))
scaled_features <- raw_features |> tibble::column_to_rownames("sampleName_shWGS")
for (i in seq_along(feature_names)) {
    scaled_features[[feature_names[i]]] <-
        (scaled_features[[feature_names[i]]] - scaler_mean[i]) / scaler_scale[i]
}

contributions <- scaled_features
for (i in seq_along(feature_names)) {
    contributions[[feature_names[i]]] <- scaled_features[[feature_names[i]]] * coef_vec[i]
}
contributions <- contributions |>
    tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleName_shWGS") |>
    mutate(
        logit_score    = rowSums(across(all_of(feature_names))) + intercept,
        predicted_prob = 1 / (1 + exp(-logit_score))
    )
```

```{r feature-contributions-plot, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
outlier_contributions <- contributions |>
    filter(sampleName_shWGS %in% outlier_samples) |>
    left_join(griffin_data |> select(sampleName_shWGS, patnr) |> distinct(),
              by = "sampleName_shWGS") |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols      = all_of(feature_names),
        names_to  = "feature",
        values_to = "contribution"
    ) |>
    mutate(
        feature_short = gsub("_ER_(neg|pos)_(heme|specific)\\.5e-4_qval", "", feature) |>
            paste0("\n(", stringr::str_extract(feature, "ER_(neg|pos)_(heme|specific)"), ")"),
        direction = ifelse(contribution > 0, "Toward ER+", "Toward ER-")
    )

waterfall_data <- outlier_contributions |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    arrange(desc(abs(contribution)), .by_group = TRUE) |>
    mutate(
        cumulative   = cumsum(contribution) + intercept,
        feature_rank = row_number(),
        start        = lag(cumulative, default = intercept),
        end          = cumulative
    ) |>
    ungroup()

waterfall_data |>
    mutate(feature_ordered = tidytext::reorder_within(feature_short, -feature_rank, patnr)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = feature_ordered)) +
    geom_segment(
        aes(xend = feature_ordered, y = start, yend = end, color = direction),
        linewidth = 3
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0,         linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = intercept, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey60") +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~patnr, scales = "free_y") +
    tidytext::scale_x_reordered() +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("Toward ER+" = "#E15759", "Toward ER-" = "#4E79A7"),
        name   = ""
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Cumulative feature contributions to logit score (ER- predicted patients)",
        x     = "",
        y     = "Cumulative logit score"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_feature_contributions_waterfall.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 12, height = 6)
```

```{r sensitivity-analysis}
mean_cov_features <- feature_names[grepl("^mean_coverage_", feature_names)]
coef_vec_reduced  <- coef_vec
coef_vec_reduced[feature_names %in% mean_cov_features] <- 0

contributions_reduced <- scaled_features
for (i in seq_along(feature_names)) {
    contributions_reduced[[feature_names[i]]] <-
        scaled_features[[feature_names[i]]] * coef_vec_reduced[i]
}
contributions_reduced <- contributions_reduced |>
    tibble::rownames_to_column("sampleName_shWGS") |>
    mutate(
        logit_reduced = rowSums(across(all_of(feature_names))) + intercept,
        prob_reduced  = 1 / (1 + exp(-logit_reduced))
    )

prediction_comparison <- contributions |>
    select(sampleName_shWGS, prob_full = predicted_prob) |>
    left_join(
        contributions_reduced |> select(sampleName_shWGS, prob_reduced),
        by = "sampleName_shWGS"
    ) |>
    left_join(
        griffin_data |> select(sampleName_shWGS, timepoint, arm, is_outlier, patnr),
        by = "sampleName_shWGS"
    ) |>
    mutate(
        pred_full    = ifelse(prob_full    >= 0.5, "ER+", "ER-"),
        pred_reduced = ifelse(prob_reduced >= 0.5, "ER+", "ER-"),
        changed      = pred_full != pred_reduced
    )

prediction_comparison |>
    ggplot(aes(x = prob_full, y = prob_reduced, color = timepoint, shape = arm)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(
        data    = prediction_comparison |> filter(is_outlier),
        color   = "black", size = 4, shape = 1, stroke = 1.2
    ) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data      = prediction_comparison |> filter(is_outlier | changed),
        aes(label = patnr),
        color = "black", size = 3
    ) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey50") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    scale_color_manual(values = timepoint_colors, labels = timepoint_labels, name = "Timepoint") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("arm_A" = 16, "arm_B" = 17), labels = arm_labels, name = "Arm") +
    labs(
        title = "Sensitivity analysis: full model vs reduced model (no mean coverage features)",
        x     = "Full model P(ER+)",
        y     = "Reduced model P(ER+)"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_sensitivity_analysis_full_vs_reduced.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
```

## GC bias validation

```{r gc-bias-curves}
gc_bias_mean_per_sample <- gc_bias_relevant |>
    filter(!is.na(smoothed_GC_bias), smoothed_GC_bias > 0) |>
    mutate(GC_bin = round(GC_content, 2)) |>
    group_by(sample, GC_bin, is_outlier) |>
    summarise(mean_bias_smooth = mean(smoothed_GC_bias, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot() +
    geom_line(
        data = gc_bias_mean_per_sample |> filter(!is_outlier),
        aes(x = GC_bin, y = mean_bias_smooth, group = sample),
        color = "grey70", alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.3
    ) +
    geom_line(
        data = gc_bias_mean_per_sample |> filter(is_outlier),
        aes(x = GC_bin, y = mean_bias_smooth, color = sample),
        linewidth = 1
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
    scale_color_manual(values = outlier_colors, name = "Predicted ER-") +
    labs(
        title = "Mean smoothed GC bias per sample (fragment lengths 100-200 bp)",
        x     = "GC content",
        y     = "Smoothed GC bias"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_gc_bias_curves.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r gc-bias-magnitude}
gc_bias_magnitude <- gc_bias_relevant |>
    filter(!is.na(smoothed_GC_bias), smoothed_GC_bias > 0) |>
    group_by(sample, is_outlier) |>
    summarise(
        mean_abs_deviation = mean(abs(smoothed_GC_bias - 1)),
        bias_range         = max(smoothed_GC_bias) - min(smoothed_GC_bias),
        .groups            = "drop"
    ) |>
    left_join(
        griffin_data |> select(sampleName_shWGS, patnr) |> distinct(),
        by = c("sample" = "sampleName_shWGS")
    )

gc_bias_magnitude |>
    ggplot(aes(x = mean_abs_deviation, y = bias_range)) +
    geom_point(
        data  = gc_bias_magnitude |> filter(!is_outlier),
        color = "grey50", size = 2, alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_point(
        data = gc_bias_magnitude |> filter(is_outlier),
        aes(color = sample), size = 4
    ) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        data      = gc_bias_magnitude |> filter(is_outlier),
        aes(label = patnr, color = sample),
        size = 3.5
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = outlier_colors, name = "Predicted ER-") +
    labs(
        title    = "GC bias magnitude per sample",
        subtitle = "ER- predicted outliers fall within the lower half of the cohort",
        x        = "Mean |bias − 1| (deviation from ideal)",
        y        = "Bias range (max − min)"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_gc_bias_magnitude.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
```

```{r uncorrected-vs-corrected, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
coverage_both |>
    filter(sample %in% outlier_samples) |>
    mutate(site_name_clean = gsub("\\.5e-4_qval", "", site_name)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = position, y = coverage, color = correction, linetype = correction)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    facet_grid(sample ~ site_name_clean, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("uncorrected" = "#F28E2B", "GC_corrected" = "#4E79A7"),
        name   = "Correction"
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
        values = c("uncorrected" = "dashed", "GC_corrected" = "solid"),
        name   = "Correction"
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Uncorrected vs GC-corrected coverage for ER- predicted samples",
        x     = "Position relative to site center (bp)",
        y     = "Normalized coverage"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 8),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fragmentomics_uncorrected_vs_gc_corrected_coverage.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 12, height = 10)
```


```{r}

```
